chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 766 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.05.2025. Mr. Ghulam Abbass Akhter, Advocate for respondents. Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan. ***************** Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan has pointed out that earlier for the same relief the petitioner approached this Court and filed Const. Petition No.D-1859/2019 and the same was dismissed vide order dated 18.08.2020. Thereafter CMA 4581/2020 was filed and the same was also dismissed on 05.11.2020. Order dated 05.11.2020 reflects that petitioner has received excess payment in pension and over payment of pension was recovered from monthly pension in installments. After the decision of the earlier petition filed by petitioner instant petition has been filed in year 2024 the same being not maintainable merits no consideration and is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PS
